| [GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY = os.getenv(\"GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY\")]{.c23}                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [GOOGLE_CSE_ID = os.getenv(\"GOOGLE_CSE_ID\")]{.c23}                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [if not OPENAI_API_KEY or not GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY or not GOOGLE_CSE_ID:]{.c23}                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   raise ValueError(]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"Please set OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY, and GOOGLE_CSE_ID in your .env file.\"]{.c23}                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   )]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [client = OpenAI(api_key=OPENAI_API_KEY)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# \-\-- Step 1: Classify the Prompt \-\--]{.c23}                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [def classify_prompt(prompt: str) -\> dict:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   system_message = {]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"role\": \"system\",]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"content\": (]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"You are a classifier that analyzes user prompts and returns one of three categories ONLY:\\n\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- simple\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- reasoning\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- internet_search\\n\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"Rules:\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- Use \'simple\' for direct factual questions that need no reasoning or current events.\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- Use \'reasoning\' for logic, math, or multi-step inference questions.\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"- Use \'internet_search\' if the prompt refers to current events, recent data, or things not in your training data.\\n\\n\"]{.c23}                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \"Respond ONLY with JSON like:\\n\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \'{ \"classification\": \"simple\" }\']{.c23}                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       ),]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   }]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   user_message = {\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": prompt}]{.c23}                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   response = client.chat.completions.create(]{.c23}                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       model=\"gpt-4o\", messages=\[system_message, user_message\], temperature=1]{.c23}                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   )]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   reply = response.choices\[0\].message.content]{.c23}                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   return json.loads(reply)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# \-\-- Step 2: Google Search \-\--]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [def google_search(query: str, num_results=1) -\> list:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   url = \"https://www.googleapis.com/customsearch/v1\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   params = {]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"key\": GOOGLE_CUSTOM_SEARCH_API_KEY,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"cx\": GOOGLE_CSE_ID,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"q\": query,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       \"num\": num_results,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   }]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   try:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       response = requests.get(url, params=params)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       response.raise_for_status()]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       results = response.json()]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       if \"items\" in results and results\[\"items\"\]:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           return \[]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [               {]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [                   \"title\": item.get(\"title\"),]{.c23}                                                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [                   \"snippet\": item.get(\"snippet\"),]{.c23}                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [                   \"link\": item.get(\"link\"),]{.c23}                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [               }]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [               for item in results\[\"items\"\]]{.c23}                                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           \]]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       else:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           return \[\]]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       return {\"error\": str(e)}]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# \-\-- Step 3: Generate Response \-\--]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [def generate_response(prompt: str, classification: str, search_results=None) -\> str:]{.c23}                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   if classification == \"simple\":]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       model = \"gpt-4o-mini\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       full_prompt = prompt]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   elif classification == \"reasoning\":]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       model = \"o4-mini\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                              |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       full_prompt = prompt]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   elif classification == \"internet_search\":]{.c23}                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       model = \"gpt-4o\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       # Convert each search result dict to a readable string]{.c23}                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       if search_results:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           search_context = \"\\n\".join(]{.c23}                                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [               \[]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [                   f\"Title: {item.get(\'title\')}\\nSnippet: {item.get(\'snippet\')}\\nLink: {item.get(\'link\')}\"]{.c23}                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [                   for item in search_results]{.c23}                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [               \]]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           )]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       else:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [           search_context = \"No search results found.\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       full_prompt = f\"\"\"Use the following web results to answer the user query:]{.c23}                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [{search_context}]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [Query: {prompt}\"\"\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   response = client.chat.completions.create(]{.c23}                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       model=model,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       messages=\[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": full_prompt}\],]{.c23}                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       temperature=1,]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   )]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   return response.choices\[0\].message.content, model]{.c23}                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# \-\-- Step 4: Combined Router \-\--]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [def handle_prompt(prompt: str) -\> dict:]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   classification_result = classify_prompt(prompt)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   # Remove or comment out the next line to avoid duplicate printing]{.c23}                                                                                                                    |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   # print(\"\\n🔍 Classification Result:\", classification_result)]{.c23}                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   classification = classification_result\[\"classification\"\]]{.c23}                                                                                                                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   search_results = None]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   if classification == \"internet_search\":]{.c23}                                                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       search_results = google_search(prompt)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [       # print(\"\\n🔍 Search Results:\", search_results)]{.c23}                                                                                                                               |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   answer, model = generate_response(prompt, classification, search_results)]{.c23}                                                                                                            |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [   return {\"classification\": classification, \"response\": answer, \"model\": model}]{.c23}                                                                                                  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [test_prompt = \"What is the capital of Australia?\"]{.c23}                                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# test_prompt = \"Explain the impact of quantum computing on cryptography.\"]{.c23}                                                                                                           |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [\# test_prompt = \"When does the Australian Open 2026 start, give me full date?\"]{.c23}                                                                                                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| []{.c23}                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [result = handle_prompt(test_prompt)]{.c23}                                                                                                                                                     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [print(\"🔍 Classification:\", result\[\"classification\"\])]{.c23}                                                                                                                             |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [print(\"🧠 Model Used:\", result\[\"model\"\])]{.c23}                                                                                                                                          |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [print(\"🧠 Response:\\n\", result\[\"response\"\])]{.c23}                                                                                                                                      |
+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]{.c3}

[This Python code implements a prompt routing system to answer user
questions. It begins by loading necessary API keys from a .env file for
OpenAI and Google Custom Search. The core functionality lies in
classifying the user\'s prompt into three categories: simple, reasoning,
or internet search. A dedicated function utilizes an OpenAI model for
this classification step. If the prompt requires current information, a
Google search is performed using the Google Custom Search API. Another
function then generates the final response, selecting an appropriate
OpenAI model based on the classification. For internet search queries,
the search results are provided as context to the model. The main
handle_prompt function orchestrates this workflow, calling the
classification and search (if needed) functions before generating the
response. It returns the classification, the model used, and the
generated answer. This system efficiently directs different types of
queries to optimized methods for a better response.]{.c14}

# [Hands-On Code Example (OpenRouter)]{.c5} {#Chapter16ResourceAwareOptimization.xhtml_h.84qnr5wuukvv .c4}

[OpenRouter offers a unified interface to hundreds of AI models via a
single API endpoint. It provides automated failover and
cost-optimization, with easy integration through your preferred SDK or
framework.]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| [import requests]{.c23}                                               |
|                                                                       |
| [import json]{.c23}                                                   |
|                                                                       |
| [response = requests.post(]{.c23}                                     |
|                                                                       |
| [ url=\"https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions\",]{.c23}       |
|                                                                       |
| [ headers={]{.c23}                                                    |
|                                                                       |
| [   \"Authorization\": \"Bearer \<OPENROUTER_API_KEY\>\",]{.c23}      |
|                                                                       |
| [   \"HTTP-Referer\": \"\<YOUR_SITE_URL\>\", \# Optional. Site URL    |
| for rankings on openrouter.ai.]{.c23}                                 |
|                                                                       |
| [   \"X-Title\": \"\<YOUR_SITE_NAME\>\", \# Optional. Site title for  |
| rankings on openrouter.ai.]{.c23}                                     |
|                                                                       |
| [ },]{.c23}                                                           |
|                                                                       |
| [ data=json.dumps({]{.c23}                                            |
|                                                                       |
| [   \"model\": \"openai/gpt-4o\", \# Optional]{.c23}                  |
|                                                                       |
| [   \"messages\": \[]{.c23}                                           |
|                                                                       |
| [     {]{.c23}                                                        |
|                                                                       |
| [       \"role\": \"user\",]{.c23}                                    |
|                                                                       |
| [       \"content\": \"What is the meaning of life?\"]{.c23}          |
|                                                                       |
| [     }]{.c23}                                                        |
|                                                                       |
| [   \]]{.c23}                                                         |
|                                                                       |
| [ })]{.c23}                                                           |
|                                                                       |
| [)]{.c23}                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]{.c32}

[This code snippet uses the requests library to interact with the
OpenRouter API. It sends a POST request to the chat completion endpoint
with a user message. The request includes authorization headers with an
API key and optional site information. The goal is to get a response
from a specified language model, in this case, \"openai/gpt-4o\". ]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

[Openrouter offers two distinct methodologies for routing and
determining the computational model used to process a given
request.]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

- [Automated Model Selection:]{.c15} [ This function routes a request to
  an optimized model chosen from a curated set of available models. The
  selection is predicated on the specific content of the user\'s prompt.
  The identifier of the model that ultimately processes the request is
  returned in the response\'s metadata.]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| [{]{.c23}                                                             |
|                                                                       |
| [ \"model\": \"openrouter/auto\",]{.c23}                              |
|                                                                       |
| [ \... // Other params]{.c23}                                         |
|                                                                       |
| [}]{.c23}                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]{.c3}

- [Sequential Model Fallback: ]{.c15} [This mechanism provides
  operational redundancy by allowing users to specify a hierarchical
  list of models. The system will first attempt to process the request
  with the primary model designated in the sequence. Should this primary
  model fail to respond due to any number of error conditions---such as
  service unavailability, rate-limiting, or content filtering---the
  system will automatically re-route the request to the next specified
  model in the sequence. This process continues until a model in the
  list successfully executes the request or the list is exhausted. The
  final cost of the operation and the model identifier returned in the
  response will correspond to the model that successfully completed the
  computation.]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| [{]{.c23}                                                             |
|                                                                       |
| [ \"models\": \[\"anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet\",                      |
| \"gryphe/mythomax-l2-13b\"\],]{.c23}                                  |
|                                                                       |
| [ \... // Other params]{.c23}                                         |
|                                                                       |
| [}]{.c23}                                                             |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+

[]{.c3}

[OpenRouter offers a detailed leaderboard]{.c7} [ (]{.c34} [
[ ](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://openrouter.ai/rankings&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1759228577713745&usg=AOvVaw0V1mjqp7pfJt_2Yz-zsav8){.c29}
]{.c7} [
[https://openrouter.ai/rankings](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://openrouter.ai/rankings&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1759228577713960&usg=AOvVaw37mpfmstKAHCkdFqb4FvlJ){.c29}
]{.c35} [)]{.c34} [ which ranks available AI models based on their
cumulative token production.]{.c7} [ It also offers latest models]{.c7}
[ from different providers (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) (see Fig. 1)]{.c7}

[]{.c7}

[ ![](22/GoogleDoc/images/image2.png){.calibre2} ]{.calibre1}

[Fig. 1: OpenRouter Web site (]{.c34} [
[https://openrouter.ai/](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://openrouter.ai/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1759228577714890&usg=AOvVaw0qE-loc4-8ynGhOspGxz0Y){.c29}
]{.c28} [)]{.c7}

# [Beyond Dynamic Model Switching: A Spectrum of Agent Resource Optimizations]{.c5} {#Chapter16ResourceAwareOptimization.xhtml_h.g8jqfv1m1zzo .c37}

[Resource-aware optimization is paramount in developing intelligent
agent systems that operate efficiently and effectively within real-world
constraints.]{.c14} [ Let\'s see a number of additional
techniques:]{.c3}

[Dynamic Model Switching]{.c15} [ is a critical technique involving the
strategic selection of large language models  based on the intricacies
of the task at hand and the available computational resources.]{.c14}
[ ]{.c14} [When faced with simple queries, a lightweight, cost-effective
LLM can be deployed, whereas complex, multifaceted problems necessitate
the utilization of more sophisticated and resource-intensive
models.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Adaptive Tool Use & Selection]{.c15} [ ensures agents can intelligently
choose from a suite of tools, selecting the most appropriate and
efficient one for each specific sub-task, with careful consideration
given to factors like API usage costs, latency, and execution
time.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [This dynamic tool selection enhances overall
system efficiency by optimizing the use of external APIs and
services.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Contextual Pruning & Summarization]{.c15} [ plays a vital role in
managing the amount of information processed by agents, strategically
minimizing the prompt token count and reducing inference costs by
intelligently summarizing and selectively retaining only the most
relevant information from the interaction history, preventing
unnecessary computational overhead.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Proactive Resource Prediction]{.c15} [ involves anticipating resource
demands by forecasting future workloads and system requirements, which
allows for proactive allocation and management of resources, ensuring
system responsiveness and preventing bottlenecks.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Cost-Sensitive Exploration]{.c15} [ in multi-agent systems extends
optimization considerations to encompass communication costs alongside
traditional computational costs, influencing the strategies employed by
agents to collaborate and share information, aiming to minimize the
overall resource expenditure.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Energy-Efficient Deployment]{.c15} [ is specifically tailored for
environments with stringent resource constraints, aiming to minimize the
energy footprint of intelligent agent systems, extending operational
time and reducing overall running costs.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Parallelization & Distributed Computing Awareness]{.c15} [ leverages
distributed resources to enhance the processing power and throughput of
agents, distributing computational workloads across multiple machines or
processors to achieve greater efficiency and faster task
completion.]{.c14} [ ]{.c3}

[Learned Resource Allocation Policies]{.c15} [ introduce a learning
mechanism, enabling agents to adapt and optimize their resource
allocation strategies over time based on feedback and performance
metrics, improving efficiency through continuous refinement.]{.c14}
[ ]{.c3}

[Graceful Degradation and Fallback Mechanisms]{.c15} [ ensure that
intelligent agent systems can continue to function, albeit perhaps at a
reduced capacity, even when resource constraints are severe, gracefully
degrading performance and falling back to alternative strategies to
maintain operation and provide essential functionality.]{.c14}

# [At a Glance]{.c5} {#Chapter16ResourceAwareOptimization.xhtml_h.75rst5ok79zy .c37}

[What:]{.c38} [ Resource-Aware Optimization addresses the challenge of
managing the consumption of computational, temporal, and financial
resources in intelligent systems. LLM-based applications can be
expensive and slow, and selecting the best model or tool for every task
is often inefficient. This creates a fundamental trade-off between the
quality of a system\'s output and the resources required to produce it.
Without a dynamic management strategy, systems cannot adapt to varying
task complexities or operate within budgetary and performance
constraints.]{.c7}

[Why:]{.c38} [ The standardized solution is to build an agentic system
that intelligently monitors and allocates resources based on the task at
hand. This pattern typically employs a \"Router Agent\" to first
classify the complexity of an incoming request. The request is then
forwarded to the most suitable LLM or tool---a fast, inexpensive model
for simple queries, and a more powerful one for complex reasoning. A
\"Critique Agent\" can further refine the process by evaluating the
quality of the response, providing feedback to improve the routing logic
over time. This dynamic, multi-agent approach ensures the system
operates efficiently, balancing response quality with
cost-effectiveness.]{.c7}

[Rule of thumb:]{.c38} [ Use this pattern when operating under strict
financial budgets for API calls or computational power, building
latency-sensitive applications where quick response times are critical,
deploying agents on resource-constrained hardware such as edge devices
with limited battery life, programmatically balancing the trade-off
between response quality and operational cost, and managing complex,
multi-step workflows where different tasks have varying resource
requirements.]{.c34}

[Visual Summary]{.c39}

[ ![](22/GoogleDoc/images/image1.png){.calibre4} ]{.calibre3}

[Fig. 2: Resource-Aware Optimization Design Pattern]{.c34}

# [Key Takeaways]{.c5} {#Chapter16ResourceAwareOptimization.xhtml_h.yummzwhk5tm .c37}

- [Resource-Aware Optimization is Essential: Intelligent agents can
  manage computational, temporal, and financial resources
  dynamically.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [Decisions regarding model usage and
  execution paths are made based on real-time constraints and
  objectives.]{.c14}
- [Multi-Agent Architecture for Scalability: Google\'s ADK provides a
  multi-agent framework, enabling modular design.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14}
  [Different agents (answering, routing, critique) handle specific
  tasks.]{.c14}
- [Dynamic, LLM-Driven Routing: A Router Agent directs queries to
  language models (Gemini Flash for simple, Gemini Pro for complex)
  based on query complexity and budget.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [This optimizes
  cost and performance.]{.c14}
- [Critique Agent Functionality: A dedicated Critique Agent provides
  feedback for self-correction, performance monitoring, and refining
  routing logic, enhancing system effectiveness.]{.c14}
- [Optimization Through Feedback and Flexibility: Evaluation
  capabilities for critique and model integration flexibility contribute
  to adaptive and self-improving system behavior.]{.c14}
- [Additional Resource-Aware Optimizations: Other methods include
  Adaptive Tool Use & Selection, Contextual Pruning & Summarization,
  Proactive Resource Prediction, Cost-Sensitive Exploration in
  Multi-Agent Systems, Energy-Efficient Deployment, Parallelization &
  Distributed Computing Awareness, Learned Resource Allocation Policies,
  Graceful Degradation and Fallback Mechanisms, and Prioritization of
  Critical Tasks.]{.c14}

# [Conclusions]{.c5} {#Chapter16ResourceAwareOptimization.xhtml_h.mm9kdxintcly .c37}

[Resource-aware optimization is essential for the development of
intelligent agents, enabling efficient operation within real-world
constraints.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [By managing computational, temporal, and
financial resources, agents can achieve optimal performance and
cost-effectiveness.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [Techniques such as dynamic model
switching, adaptive tool use, and contextual pruning are crucial for
attaining these efficiencies.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [Advanced strategies,
including learned resource allocation policies and graceful degradation,
enhance an agent\'s adaptability and resilience under varying
conditions.]{.c14} [ ]{.c14} [Integrating these optimization principles
into agent design is fundamental for building scalable, robust, and
sustainable AI systems.]{.c14}

    ]{.c28} [ ]{.c3}

    [https://openrouter.ai/docs/quickstart](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://openrouter.ai/docs/quickstart&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1759228577733942&usg=AOvVaw1x3bOCyVbiyBns-bTqNdy_){.c29}
    ]{.c28} [ ]{.c3}

[]{.c3}

[]{#Chapter17ReasoningTechniques.xhtml}

[Chapter 17: Reasoning Techniques]{.c2}

[This chapter delves into advanced reasoning methodologies for
intelligent agents, focusing on multi-step logical inferences and
problem-solving.]{.c4} [ ]{.c4} [These techniques go beyond simple
sequential operations, making the agent\'s internal reasoning
explicit.]{.c4} [ ]{.c4} [This allows agents to break down problems,
consider intermediate steps, and reach more robust and accurate
conclusions.]{.c4} [  ]{.c5} [A core principle among these advanced
methods is the allocation of increased computational resources during
inference.]{.c4} [ ]{.c4} [This means granting the agent, or the
underlying LLM, more processing time or steps to process a query and
generate a response.]{.c4} [ ]{.c4} [Rather than a quick, single pass,
the agent can engage in iterative refinement, explore multiple solution
paths, or utilize external tools.]{.c4} [ ]{.c4} [This extended
processing time during inference often significantly enhances accuracy,
coherence, and robustness, especially for complex problems requiring
deeper analysis and deliberation.]{.c4}

# [Practical Applications & Use Cases]{.c7} {#Chapter17ReasoningTechniques.xhtml_h.ennipwp8xhet .c6}

[Practical applications include:]{.c5}

- [Complex Question Answering:]{.c11} [ Facilitating the resolution of
  multi-hop queries, which necessitate the integration of data from
  diverse sources and the execution of logical deductions, potentially
  involving the examination of multiple reasoning paths, and benefiting
  from extended inference time to synthesize information.]{.c12}
- [Mathematical Problem Solving:]{.c11} [ Enabling the division of
  mathematical problems into smaller, solvable components, illustrating
  the step-by-step process, and employing code execution for precise
  computations, where prolonged inference enables more intricate code
  generation and validation.]{.c12}
- [Code Debugging and Generation:]{.c11} [ Supporting an agent\'s
  explanation of its rationale for generating or correcting code,
  pinpointing potential issues sequentially, and iteratively refining
  the code based on test results (Self-Correction), leveraging extended
  inference time for thorough debugging cycles.]{.c12}
- [Strategic Planning:]{.c11} [ Assisting in the development of
  comprehensive plans through reasoning across various options,
  consequences, and preconditions, and adjusting plans based on
  real-time feedback (ReAct), where extended deliberation can lead to
  more effective and reliable plans.]{.c12}
- [Medical Diagnosis:]{.c11} [ Aiding an agent in systematically
  assessing symptoms, test outcomes, and patient histories to reach a
  diagnosis, articulating its reasoning at each phase, and potentially
  utilizing external instruments for data retrieval (ReAct).]{.c12}
  [ ]{.c12} [Increased inference time allows for a more comprehensive
  differential diagnosis.]{.c12}
- [Legal Analysis:]{.c11} [ Supporting the analysis of legal documents
  and precedents to formulate arguments or provide guidance, detailing
  the logical steps taken, and ensuring logical consistency through
  self-correction.]{.c12} [ ]{.c12} [Increased inference time allows for
  more in-depth legal research and argument construction.]{.c12}

# [Reasoning techniques]{.c7} {#Chapter17ReasoningTechniques.xhtml_h.iwu2i0st214l .c13}

[To start, let\'s delve into the ]{.c12} [core reasoning]{.c12}
[ techniques used to enhance the problem-solving abilities of AI
models..]{.c15}

[]{.c15}

[Chain-of-Thought (CoT)]{.c17} [ prompting significantly enhances LLMs
complex reasoning abilities by mimicking a step-by-step thought process
(see Fig. 1).]{.c15} [ ]{.c15} [Instead of providing a direct answer,
CoT prompts guide the model to generate a sequence of intermediate
reasoning steps.]{.c15} [ ]{.c15} [This explicit breakdown allows LLMs
to tackle complex problems by decomposing them into smaller, more
manageable sub-problems.]{.c15} [ ]{.c12} [This technique markedly
improves the model\'s performance on tasks requiring multi-step
reasoning, such as arithmetic, common sense reasoning, and symbolic
manipulation.]{.c15} [ ]{.c15} [A primary advantage of CoT is its
ability to transform a difficult, single-step problem into a series of
simpler steps, thereby increasing the transparency of the LLM\'s
reasoning process.]{.c15} [ ]{.c15} [This approach not only boosts
accuracy but also offers valuable insights into the model\'s
decision-making, aiding in debugging and comprehension.]{.c15} [ ]{.c15}
[ ]{.c12} [CoT can be implemented using various strategies, including
offering few-shot examples that demonstrate step-by-step reasoning or
simply instructing the model to \"think step by step.\" Its
effectiveness stems from its ability to guide the model\'s internal
processing toward a more deliberate and logical progression.]{.c12}
[ ]{.c12} [As a result, Chain-of-Thought has become a cornerstone
technique for enabling advanced reasoning capabilities in contemporary
LLMs.]{.c12} [ ]{.c11} [This enhanced transparency and breakdown of
complex problems into manageable sub-problems is particularly important
for autonomous agents, as it enables them to perform more reliable and
auditable actions in complex environments.]{.c12}

[ ]{.c12} [ ![](23/GoogleDoc/images/image2.png){.calibre1} ]{.calibre}

[Fig. 1: CoT prompt alongside the detailed, step-by-step response
generated by the agent.]{.c2}

[]{.c2}

[Let\'s see an example.  It begins with a set of instructions that tell
the AI ]{.c12} [how]{.c12} [ to think, defining its persona and a clear
five-step process to follow. This is the prompt that initiates
structured thinking.]{.c15}

[]{.c15}

[Following that, the example shows the CoT process in action. The
section labeled \"Agent\'s Thought Process\" is the internal monologue
where the model executes the instructed steps. This is the literal
\"chain of thought.\" Finally, the \"Agent\'s Final Answer\" is the
polished, comprehensive output generated as a result of that careful,
step-by-step reasoning process]{.c15}

[]{.c15}

+-----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| [You are an Information Retrieval Agent. Your goal is to answer the   |
| user\'s question comprehensively and accurately by thinking           |
| step-by-step.]{.c23}                                                  |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [Here\'s the process you must follow:]{.c23}                          |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [1.  \*\*Analyze the Query:\*\* Understand the core subject and       |
| specific requirements of the user\'s question. Identify key entities, |
| keywords, and the type of information being sought.]{.c23}            |
|                                                                       |
| [2.  \*\*Formulate Search Queries (for Knowledge Base):\*\* Based on  |
| your analysis, generate a list of precise search queries that you     |
| would use to retrieve relevant information from a knowledge base or   |
| external tools.]{.c23}                                                |
|                                                                       |
| [3.  \*\*Simulate Information Retrieval                               |
| (Self-Correction/Reasoning):\*\* For each search query, mentally      |
| consider what kind of information you expect to find. If you were to  |
| retrieve the content, what would be the most relevant snippets? Think |
| about potential ambiguities or missing pieces.]{.c23}                 |
|                                                                       |
| [4.  \*\*Synthesize Information:\*\* Based on the simulated retrieval |
| and your understanding of the user\'s original query, synthesize the  |
| gathered information into a coherent and complete answer. Ensure all  |
| aspects of the query are addressed.]{.c23}                            |
|                                                                       |
| [5.  \*\*Review and Refine:\*\* Before finalizing, critically         |
| evaluate your answer. Is it accurate? Is it comprehensive? Is it easy |
| to understand? Is it concise? If not, identify what needs to be       |
| improved and how.]{.c23}                                              |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*User Query:\*\* \"Explain the main differences between classical |
| computers and quantum computers, and briefly describe a potential     |
| application of quantum computing.\"]{.c23}                            |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Agent\'s Thought Process (Internal CoT Output - encouraged by    |
| the prompt):\*\*]{.c23}                                               |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Thought 1 (Analyze Query):\*\*]{.c23}                            |
|                                                                       |
| [The user wants two things:]{.c23}                                    |
|                                                                       |
| [1.  Main differences between classical and quantum computers.]{.c23} |
|                                                                       |
| [2.  One potential application of quantum computing.]{.c23}           |
|                                                                       |
| [Keywords: classical computers, quantum computers, differences,       |
| potential application.]{.c23}                                         |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Thought 2 (Formulate Search Queries):\*\*]{.c23}                 |
|                                                                       |
| [- \"differences classical vs quantum computers\"]{.c23}              |
|                                                                       |
| [- \"how quantum computers work\"]{.c23}                              |
|                                                                       |
| [- \"how classical computers work\"]{.c23}                            |
|                                                                       |
| [- \"applications of quantum computing\"]{.c23}                       |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Thought 3 (Simulate Information Retrieval & Identify Key         |
| Concepts):\*\*]{.c23}                                                 |
|                                                                       |
| [- From \"differences\": Expect concepts like bits vs. qubits,        |
| superposition, entanglement, probabilistic nature, computational      |
| power for specific problems.]{.c23}                                   |
|                                                                       |
| [- From \"how they work\": Classical uses transistors/binary. Quantum |
| uses quantum mechanics.]{.c23}                                        |
|                                                                       |
| [- From \"applications\": Expect drug discovery, material science,    |
| cryptography, optimization.]{.c23}                                    |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Thought 4 (Synthesize Information):\*\*]{.c23}                   |
|                                                                       |
| [Classical computers use bits (0 or 1), processing information        |
| sequentially. Quantum computers use qubits, which can be 0, 1, or     |
| both simultaneously (superposition), and can be entangled, allowing   |
| for vastly different computational approaches. This enables them to   |
| solve certain problems (like factoring large numbers or simulating    |
| complex molecules) far more efficiently than classical computers. A   |
| potential application is in drug discovery, where quantum computers   |
| could simulate molecular interactions with unprecedented accuracy,    |
| accelerating the development of new medicines.]{.c23}                 |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Thought 5 (Review and Refine):\*\*]{.c23}                        |
|                                                                       |
| [- Differences are covered (bits vs qubits, superposition,            |
| entanglement, processing).]{.c23}                                     |
|                                                                       |
| [- Application is given (drug discovery).]{.c23}                      |
|                                                                       |
| [- Is it brief? Yes.]{.c23}                                           |
|                                                                       |
| [- Is it clear? Yes.]{.c23}                                           |
|                                                                       |
| [- Looks good.]{.c23}                                                 |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [\*\*Agent\'s Final Answer (Output to User):\*\*]{.c23}               |
|                                                                       |
| []{.c23}                                                              |
|                                                                       |
| [Classical computers process information using bits, which can be     |
